mapper.sql: id, merchants_id AS merchantsId, user_id AS userId, username, phone_number AS phoneNumber, plan, license_plate AS licensePlate, brand_id AS brandId, remake, order_number AS orderNumber, state, settle_accounts AS settleAccounts, fixloss_user AS fixlossUser, fixloss, creat_time AS creatTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT a.id indentid, a.order_number orderNumber, a.license_plate carId, a.brand_id brand, a.send_unit sendUnit, b.merchants_name merchantsName FROM app_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user AS b ON a.user_b_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY a.creat_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20

SELECT id indentId, state state, username name, phone_number phoneNumber, license_plate carId, plan plan, brand_id brand, fixloss fixloss, commission_rate commissionRate, settle_accounts settleAccounts, means_payments meansPayments, fixloss_user fixlossUser, rescue_them_fee rescueThemFee, responsibility, insurance_company insuranceCompany, send_unit sendUnit, send_people sendPeople, remake remake, settle_fours_company_rate settleFoursCompanyRate FROM app_indent WHERE id = #{indentId}
SELECT sum(fixloss_user) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND send_back = 1

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN state=1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) newIndent, COUNT(CASE WHEN state=2 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) beforeShop, COUNT(CASE WHEN state=3 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) inService, COUNT(CASE WHEN (state=4 OR state = 5) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) endService, COUNT(CASE WHEN state=6 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) alreadySolved FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.id indentid, a.order_number orderNumber, a.license_plate carId, a.brand_id brand, b.merchants_name merchantsName FROM app_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user AS b ON a.user_b_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{id} AND (a.state=4 OR a.state = 5) ORDER BY a.creat_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20
select * from app_indent where DATE_FORMAT(creat_time,'%Y-%m-%d') < #{dateString1} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 0,1
